PR 24511 (SQL generation UI changes) could affect how SQL is generated and previewed in pipelines"},{"id":105783,"name":"Clustered columnstore storage option for staging and warehouse tables","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"Clustered columnstore storage; PR 24516 fixes storage engine check for measure naming — columnstore option selection could be affected"},{"id":97149,"name":"Modeller - Offline Datasource supports composite tables","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"should-run","reasoning":"NAV offline datasource composite tables; PR 24474 fixes NAV dimension relationship mapping which could affect composite table joins"},{"id":112148,"name":"Performance testing of models with Azure SQL warehouse","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Azure SQL warehouse performance; PR 24412 (optimized cube definition loading behind feature switch) may improve or change processing timing"}],"summary":"This release is dominated by Copilot and analysis design changes (PRs 24464, 24484, 24499, 24510 and others) that pervasively touch CellSets, CubeModel, DimensionTree, and the Analytics portal — making all Tier-1 analytics tests mandatory. The deferred slicer loading change (PR 24449) and per-user tabular security (PR 24479) are the highest-risk functional changes and drive must-run coverage for slicers, filters, and connection/security tests. DataSource regression is spread across MYOB, Intacct, OData, NAV, and the brand-new Acumatica connector, warranting targeted should-run tests for each affected source. Licensing and processing limit changes (PRs 24467, 24453) require verification of processing triggers and data limit enforcement."}

prs.pr_title: Patching for analysis design and function search tool
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Copilot (JsonPatchApplicator, CopilotModelPatcher, PatchAttributes) which sit in the highest-blast-radius layer and are consumed across the entire platform.

prs.pr_title: Add processing time grace period
prs.risk_reasoning: Touches SharedSource/Core/Licensing and SharedSource/Licensing alongside Modeller/Core and Portal/Controllers, spanning three product areas with a shared licensing interface change.

prs.pr_title: Approval required for changing current analysis design
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Web.Core/Copilot (CopilotClientProvider, CopilotContext, ICopilotToolProvider) and SharedSource/Core/Logging alongside Portal controllers and CellSet serialization models — changes to Web.Core base classes affect all web endpoints.

prs.pr_title: Fix AI notification creation/evaluation
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/Caching/RequestCacheHelper and SharedSource/Web.Core/Caching/WebRequestCacheHelper — changes to shared caching infrastructure affect all server-side request handling across the platform.

prs.pr_title: Optimized Cube Definition loading behind feature switch.

prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112955,"type":"Change Request","title":"Data Hub and Zap Live analytics against Power BI performance","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: use JsonSerializer to correctly escape exception message for Json
prs.risk_reasoning: Single file change in SharedSource/Web.Core/Mvc/ServerSentEvents.cs — any modification to SharedSource/Web.Core is Score 1 as it underpins all web endpoints across the platform.

prs.pr_title: skip view testing if it's been done already
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/FeatureSwitching (highest blast radius) alongside Modeller/Core pipeline finalizer and a core feature switch, affecting all consumers of the shared feature switching infrastructure.

prs.pr_title: Dimension tree copilot tools
prs.risk_reasoning: 50 files spanning Portal Controllers, Client (QueryDesign, DesignBar, ResourceTabs, Copilot, Banner), Controls (CellSets, MemberActions), Resources (CellSets, CubeModel, OLAP connections) — touches multiple major product areas simultaneously with high blast radius.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: 85 files across Modeller/Core pipelines (StepCascaders, SchemaVisitors, Updaters), Modeller/AnalysisServices (security, cube model, DSV), Portal unit tests, and SharedSource — extensive cross-cutting changes to core pipeline infrastructure.

prs.pr_title: Add per-user security for tabular server connections
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Core/CoreSwitch.cs and SharedSource/Core/FeatureSwitching (highest blast radius) alongside security-critical OLAP connection string and effective-user-name handling across both Portal and Modeller/UI.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113095,"type":"Change Request","title":"Security for data hub analytics against power bi/AAS","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Initial analysis design copilot
prs.risk_reasoning: 56 files spanning CellSets serialization models, CubeModel, OLAP connection/caching layer, Portal controllers, and Copilot tools — introduces a new AI-driven analysis design feature that rewrites core resource serialisation and connection infrastructure used by all analysis views.

prs.pr_title: Copilot tool display names
prs.risk_reasoning: Introduces a new copilot tool display name provider in SharedSource/Web.Core (affecting all web endpoints) while simultaneously changing Portal copilot controllers, Modeller/UI copilot tools, and ICopilotToolProvider interface — cross-cutting across shared infrastructure and multiple product areas.

prs.pr_title: permit exclusion of history columns from key attribute
prs.risk_reasoning: 57 files across Modeller/Core pipeline validation (history rules, granularity, primary key, relationship inference), Modeller/AnalysisServices, Modeller/CubeModel, and BI/Resources (Query, Slicers, FormulaQueryEvaluator) — broad changes to pipeline validation rules with high regression potential for all pipeline types.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113101,"type":"Bug","title":"Cannot exclude history columns from dimension's key attribute","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Deep link spike
prs.risk_reasoning: 84 files across BI/Portal/Client, BI/Resources (CubeModel, OLAP connections with AMO/TOM), Modeller/Core (analytics, parameters, pipelines), Modeller/CubeModel, Modeller/CubeModelBuilders, and Modeller/Serialization.Core — deep link feature touches cube model, serialisation, and connection layers across both major repos.

prs.pr_title: add title to table select all directive
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies SharedSource/Web.Core/Client/Desktop/Tables/TableSelections.ts — a shared UI component used across all web table interfaces; any regression in table selection behaviour would affect the whole Portal.

prs.pr_title: Give the ZapDataSourceUser a new password
prs.risk_reasoning: Security-sensitive change modifying how the ZapDataSourceUser password is set during tenant migration and Azure SQL resource provisioning — a failure here could break tenant restore or provisioning flows.

prs.pr_title: misc cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: 45 files heavily refactoring Presentation/PivotTables domain (CellContent hierarchy, Matrix, Factories, Renderer) — core report rendering layer with high regression surface even if marked cleanup.

prs.pr_title: update SQL generation UI
prs.risk_reasoning: Spans Modeller/AnalysisServices (expression deployer), Modeller/UI/Client calculation editors, Portal Copilot, and localization across multiple languages — changes to AnalysisServices expression deployment carry breaking-change potential.

prs.pr_title: Copilot improvements, AI tools API and more evals
prs.risk_reasoning: Introduces a new AIToolsApi controller and significantly reworks Copilot tools across Portal and Modeller/UI layers; new API surface plus eval infrastructure touches multiple Copilot subsystems.

prs.pr_title: Updated Zap packages
prs.risk_reasoning: Package version bumps across ApiService, CrmOnlineServices, FeatureRollout, Licensing, and Tenancy simultaneously — any breaking change in a shared Zap package propagates to all five services.

prs.pr_title: Measures deploy to tabular using the column name
prs.risk_reasoning: 63 files changing measure naming logic across Modeller/Core domain model, Ssas.Tabular generation, and serialization — behavioural change to how measures are named in tabular deployments with broad regression risk.

prs.pr_title: Add custom scheduled upgrade support
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies core tenancy backend — TenantController, StagedProductRolloutRunner, and StagedProductRolloutScheduler — which directly controls tenant upgrade orchestration for all customers. Breakage here affects platform-wide upgrade reliability.

prs.pr_title: SQL Copilot POC
prs.risk_reasoning: 74 files reworking Modeller/Core pipeline domain model (calculation settings, step cascaders), serialization converters, and Ssas.Tabular — very large change to core pipeline internals with high regression surface.

prs.pr_title: Attribute parameterization for deep links
prs.risk_reasoning: 58 files spanning Modeller/Core analytics and validation, CubeModel/CubeModelBuilders, Ssas.Tabular generation, and serialization — broad structural change to attribute deep-link feature touching multiple core Modeller subsystems.

prs.risk_reasoning: Fixes StagedProductRolloutScheduler logic for custom scheduled upgrades outside the weekly window — a targeted bug fix in upgrade scheduling that could affect when all tenants receive upgrades if the fix introduces a regression.

prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113132,"type":"Bug","title":"Processing time limit enforcement - no email received if the model is copied from another user","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: filter cleanup
prs.risk_reasoning: Filter cleanup in the DataSources repo — refactoring existing filter code carries a risk of altering behaviour even when intent is cosmetic.

prs.pr_title: Add deferred slicer loading support on server
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds deferred slicer loading via CellSetApiController and CellSetResultBuilder — new server-side behaviour but additive and contained to the slicer/cell-set pipeline.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112955,"type":"Change Request","title":"Data Hub and Zap Live analytics against Power BI performance","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Add custom scheduled upgrade UI
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds custom scheduled upgrade UI to the tenant management screens. Changes existing TenantList, TenantListToolbar, and TenantsController so existing tenant admin workflows could regress.

prs.pr_title: Using spans for inline boxes
prs.risk_reasoning: Changing inline box elements from one HTML element type to spans in a shared client library could affect layout or styling across all Portal consumers of those components.

prs.pr_title: BC Cloud - Add Service-to-Service (Client Credentials) Authentication
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds a new Client Credentials authentication path to the BC Cloud connector; new auth flows need verification that existing OAuth flows are unaffected.

prs.pr_title: avoid footguns
prs.risk_reasoning: Defensive refactoring to avoid error-prone patterns — changes to existing runtime code paths carry a small regression risk even when intent is protective.

prs.pr_title: Breaking up cube def tools and improving analysis design copilot
prs.risk_reasoning: 5-file refactor splitting cube definition tools within BI/Portal/Copilot — contained restructuring of a single Copilot feature area with no shared layer impact.

prs.pr_title: Intacct - AP Aging Fixes
prs.risk_reasoning: Fixes to AP Aging calculations in the Intacct connector; financial data correctness fixes require regression testing of the Intacct AP Aging reports.

prs.pr_title: NAV dimension relationship mapping fixes
prs.risk_reasoning: Fixes dimension relationship mapping in the Dynamics NAV connector, which is an existing data pipeline path; incorrect mapping could silently distort financial dimension data for NAV customers.

prs.pr_title: Intacct - Align AP Aging columns with AR Aging
prs.risk_reasoning: Aligning AP Aging column structure with AR Aging in the Intacct connector modifies existing schema output, which could break downstream reports or model mappings that rely on the previous column layout.

prs.pr_title: fix notification evaluation and authentication.
prs.risk_reasoning: Fixes notification evaluation and authentication logic in ZappyBot — a bug fix to existing auth code that could have subtle side-effects on notification delivery if the fix is incorrect.

prs.pr_title: Fix RequiresDataAccessConsent api call gets blocked by Fastly and better error handling on denied api calls
prs.risk_reasoning: Multiple files changed in the Teams Copilot bot service — fixes API consent flow blocked by Fastly and adds new exception types for denied calls. Error-handling changes to an active integration path carry moderate regression risk.

prs.pr_title: OData - Migrate OData HTTP layer to HttpCommon.HttpClient
prs.risk_reasoning: Migrating the OData HTTP layer to a shared HttpCommon.HttpClient is a meaningful infrastructure change to an existing connector; any behavioural difference in the new client (timeouts, auth headers, error handling) could affect all OData-based data sources.

prs.pr_title: block LastChild on string measures
prs.risk_reasoning: Single file change adding a validation rule to block LastChild aggregation on string measures — isolated to one validation rule but modifies existing analytical validation behaviour that affects measure configuration.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113110,"type":"Bug","title":"Cube processing error when string measure is set to last child","state":"Testing"}]

prs.pr_title: Xero in-memory filter for journals JournalDate column
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding an in-memory date filter to the Xero Journals table modifies existing data retrieval behaviour; incorrect filter logic could silently exclude or misorder journal entries for Xero customers.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112116,"type":"Change Request","title":"Partitioning support for Access data sources","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Prevent blocking task when retrieving wamp connections from the pool
prs.risk_reasoning: Single file fix to async/blocking behaviour in WampConnection pool retrieval — isolated to one connection class but concurrency fixes carry subtle regression risk for WAMP-dependent data source operations.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113088,"type":"Bug","title":"Sage X3 Cloud, Sage 100, and Syspro data sources were stuck on loading on .2 build after testing connection","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: [Tenancy] Processing time grace period
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds new API models and endpoints for processing time grace period in TenancyService — purely additive new endpoints and data models with no modification of existing API behaviour.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112846,"type":"Change Request","title":"Cloud Management - Option to suppress processing time limit for a while","state":"Active"}]

prs.pr_title: Allow copilot chat to continue on error

testRecommendations.refineSummary: This release is dominated by Copilot and analysis design changes (PRs 24464, 24484, 24499, 24510 and others) that pervasively touch CellSets, CubeModel, DimensionTree, and the Analytics portal — making all Tier-1 analytics tests mandatory. The deferred slicer loading change (PR 24449) and per-user tabular security (PR 24479) are the highest-risk functional changes and drive must-run coverage for slicers, filters, and connection/security tests. DataSource regression is spread across MYOB, Intacct, OData, NAV, and the brand-new Acumatica connector, warranting targeted should-run tests for each affected source. Licensing and processing limit changes (PRs 24467, 24453) require verification of processing triggers and data limit enforcement.
